title: Vedic Astrology
subtitle: Decode Your Destiny Through the Stars
tagline: Your birth chart is a cosmic blueprint — let us help you read it.
description: Vedic astrology, known as Jyotish Shastra, is the sacred science of light. By studying the precise positions of the sun, moon, and planets at the moment of your birth, Acharya Sumit reveals the patterns and potentials woven into your life's journey.

title: Numerology
subtitle: The Hidden Power of Your Numbers
tagline: Every name, every date holds a vibration. Learn yours.
description: Numbers are the language of the universe. Numerology decodes the vibrations hidden in your name and birth date to reveal your life path, destiny number, personality traits, and the cosmic cycles influencing your life right now.

title: Vastu Shastra
subtitle: Harmonise Your Space, Transform Your Life
tagline: When your home is in harmony with the cosmos, everything flows.
description: Vastu Shastra is the ancient Indian science of architecture and spatial energy. Acharya Sumit analyzes the five elemental energies (Pancha Bhuta) in your home or office to identify imbalances and provide remedies that invite prosperity, health, and peace.

title: Tarot Reading
subtitle: Illuminate Your Path with Ancient Wisdom
tagline: The cards reveal what the mind already knows but hasn't voiced.
description: Tarot is not about predicting a fixed future — it is a mirror for your inner wisdom. Through expertly guided spreads, Acharya Sumit helps you gain clarity on relationships, career choices, emotional blocks, and the direction your soul is calling you toward.
